What we buy

Six reasons people call us

If it tows, we are interested. Tell us what you have and we will give you a straight answer the same day.

Touring caravans

Any make, any age, single or twin axle. Bought outright and collected.

Damp and damaged

Damp readings, water ingress or storm damage are not a problem here.

Motorhomes

Campervans and motorhomes bought outright, coachbuilt or panel van.

Statics

Static caravans bought from parks, gardens and private land.

Full collections

Storage yard clearances and multiple vans bought in one visit.

Fast payment

Funds sent and cleared before your caravan leaves the driveway.

What sellers say

TomOwner
Meet the owner

Straight talking, no messing

Flog My Caravan is run by Tom. When you call the number on this page, that is who you speak to. He values the van, he makes the offer and he brings the money.

Tom has been buying, towing and trading caravans for the best part of fifteen years, a family hobby that turned into a full time job. He started Flog My Caravan after watching too many sellers get messed about online: ghosted buyers, silly offers and no-shows. His way is simpler, one honest figure and a handshake.

  • One point of contact from first call to collection
  • No obligation to accept the offer
  • Happy to talk it through before you decide
Speak to Tom now
Where we cover

Lancashire and the surrounding area

Based in Lancashire and out on the road most days. If you are just outside the county, ring and ask, we travel further than most.
